headline: Sarawak Digital Economy Hub Attracts RM6.8 Billion
context: Sarawak SDEC digital economy initiative secured RM6.8 billion in investments from 42 companies establishing data centres and tech operations.

cards.big: 42 companies invested RM6.8 billion in Sarawak digital economy zone
cards.sub: Cheap hydropower at 8 sen per kWh attracted data centre operators to Kuching

cards.big: Sarawak aims to host 15 hyperscale data centres by 2028
cards.sub: Currently 4 operational with 6 under construction in the Sama Jaya area

cards.big: SDEC created 3,400 tech jobs but only 28% went to local Sarawakians
cards.sub: Skills mismatch means most high-paying positions filled by outside workers

cards.big: Bakun and Murum dams provide 4,400MW capacity for energy-intensive facilities
cards.sub: Environmental groups question whether indigenous displacement now benefits foreign firms

cards.big: Digital investment tests whether Sarawak captures value or just provides cheap power
RM6.8 billion in digital investment proves Sarawak can build an economy beyond resource extraction.
